title: Calendar View Depth
description: Defines the depth level for calendar view selection, determining the granularity of date selection and navigation.

props.name: year
props.description: Allows selection at year level, enabling year-based navigation and selection.

props.name: month
props.description: Allows selection at month level, enabling month-based navigation and selection.

props.name: day
props.description: Allows selection at day level, enabling day-based navigation and selection.
